title: Basic Web Hosting
description: Reliable, affordable web hosting for small businesses and freelancers who want a professional online presence without the complexity. Perfect for getting your business or personal site online quickly.
targetAudience: Lawyers, accountants, doctors, and other professionals running small practices
body: Our Basic Web Hosting plan gives you everything you need to establish your online presence. Whether you run a local restaurant, landscaping business, or just want a professional looking website, we make it simple and affordable to get online.
note: For new websites only — this plan does not include migrating an existing site.
